---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description

Clear and concise description of the feature.

## Problem It Solves

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it address?

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? What should it do?

## Example Use Case

Provide a concrete example of how this feature would be used.

## Alternatives Considered

Are there other ways to solve this problem?

## Additional Context

Any other information or mockups/sketches.

---

**Is this related to a problem?** Link related issues or discussions.

**See Also:** Check [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) for planned features.
